test_local.py :: colors
class colors:
    OK = "\033[92m"
    FAIL = "\033[91m"
    WARN = "\033[93m"
    BOLD = "\033[1m"
    END = "\033[0m"

test_local.py :: main
def main():
    global passed, failed
    c = httpx.Client(base_url=BASE, timeout=TIMEOUT)

    # ── 0. Health check ────────────────────────────────────────
    step("0. Health check")
    r = c.get("/health")
    check("GET /health", r)

    # ── 1. Signup two users ────────────────────────────────────
    step("1. Create test users")
    import uuid
    tag = uuid.uuid4().hex[:6]
    owner_email = f"testowner_{tag}@example.com"
    member_email = f"testmember_{tag}@example.com"
    password = "TestPass123!"

    r = c.post("/auth/signup", json={
        "email": owner_email, "password": password, "full_name": "Test Owner"
    })
    d = check("Signup owner", r, 200)
    if not d or not d.get("data"):
        print(f"{colors.FAIL}Cannot continue without owner signup{colors.END}")
        sys.exit(1)
    owner_token = d["data"]["access_token"]
    owner_id = d["data"]["user"]["id"]

    r = c.post("/auth/signup", json={
        "email": member_email, "password": password, "full_name": "Test Member"
    })
    d = check("Signup member", r, 200)
    member_token = d["data"]["access_token"]
    member_id = d["data"]["user"]["id"]

    # ── 2. Create a bill ───────────────────────────
